inputs.titre: Création de la Casa de Contratación

reason: The image depicts a grand hall with figures working at tables, covered in parchment. The clothing style and general atmosphere seem appropriate for the 16th century, and thus could be depicting the Casa de Contratación. However, the presence of several modern electric lamps is an anachronism that disqualifies the image. These types of lamps were invented in the 19th century, far later than the 16th century. These were not used during the time of the Casa de Contratación in 1503.
